content.summary: Inter-branch procedures operationalize separation of powers through confirmation processes, veto overrides, judicial review, and oversight mechanisms.
key_points: Senate confirmation hearings for judicial and executive nominees
Congressional oversight through committee investigations, GAO audits, CRS reports
Judicial review initiated through case or controversy with standing
Impeachment process: House brings charges, Senate conducts trial
Budget process requires presidential submission, congressional appropriation
War powers consultation requirements under War Powers Resolution
content.philosophy_guard_note: Descriptive claim about presidential systems; no normative advocacy regarding what should be
